notes: Attempts to perform first time setup, then exits before launch is complete.
title: Nimble Writer

notes:
Worked perfectly after installing "dotnet40" package on the Wine prefix for Nimble Writer (SteamApp ID 348200). This can be accomplished several different ways, but the way I did so was thusly...

STEP 1: Install "protontricks" from https://github.com/Sirmentio/protontricks.
STEP 2: After installing Nimble Writer via Steam Play, search for the application's wine prefix using the command "protontricks -s Nimble" from a Terminal.
Note: This should yield an APPID (likely 348200).
STEP 3: After verifying the APPID, install the "dotnet40" package using protontricks
(e.g. "protontricks 348200 dotnet40")
STEP 4: Follow the onscreen prompts to "Repair" the Microsoft .NET 4.0 Installation.
STEP 5: After installation is complete, run Nimble Writer from Steam.
title: Nimble Writer
